moving.title: Move easily and affordably with Hommies
moving.subtitle: We help you carry your things so you can focus on what matters — your new home.
moving.step1Body: You pack your belongings in boxes and tell us which furniture to move.
moving.step2Body: Tell us where you're moving from and to, and we'll give you a fixed price.
moving.step3Body: Our team comes and carries everything for you — safely and quickly.
moving.safeBody: Your belongings are insured throughout the move.
moving.flexibleBody: We adapt to your schedule — including weekends.
moving.carryBody: We handle all the heavy lifting so you don't have to.
moving.fixedPriceBody: No surprises — you know the price up front.
moving.readyBody: Contact us today for a no-obligation moving quote.

about.title: We connect people with the right home.
about.subtitle: Hommies is about more than just a home. It's about the people you come home to — and the community you become part of.
about.missionBody: To build Denmark's best platform for housing search and roomie matching — a safe space where you find exactly what you're looking for.
about.value1Body: The best homes are built on real connections between people — not square meters.
about.value2Body: Verified profiles, encrypted messages and digital contracts that protect everyone.
about.value3Body: Find roomies or homes in minutes. We make the complex simple — without cutting quality.
about.storyTitle: Built by people who searched for a home themselves.
about.story1: Hommies started in 2025 from our own experiences. We were a group of friends in the middle of the housing search and felt how draining it could be to find the right place to live — and the right person to live with. Housing platforms felt cold and impersonal, mostly about square meters and prices, not people.
about.story2: We missed a solution that took more than just the home into account. A platform where personality, lifestyle and chemistry actually mattered. So we built Hommies — a platform that makes finding a home and roomies more human, safer and much more effective.
about.story3: In 2026 we officially launched. The ambition is clear: we want to be Denmark's preferred platform for housing and roomie matching. A place where the right match actually makes a difference in everyday life.
about.story4: And we're only just getting started.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to find your next home?
about.ctaBody: Create a free profile and experience an easier way to find a home.

contact.messageSentBody: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

contact.subject: Subject

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body1: At Hommies we take your privacy seriously. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal data when you use our platform.
privacy.s1Body2: By using Hommies you accept the terms of this privacy policy. If you don't agree with the policy, please don't use our services.
privacy.s2Intro: We collect different types of information to provide our services:
privacy.s2Item1Body: Name, email, phone number and profile picture.
privacy.s2Item2Body: Age, gender, study/work, nationality, personality and lifestyle preferences.
privacy.s2Item3Body: If you are a landlord, we collect information about your listings.
privacy.s2Item4Body: Information about how you use the platform, including searches and interactions.
privacy.s2Item5Body: IP address, browser type, device information and cookies.
privacy.s3Title: 3. How do we use your data?
privacy.s3Intro: We use your information for the following purposes:
privacy.s3Item1: To provide and improve our services
privacy.s3Item2: To match you with relevant homes and roomies
privacy.s3Item3: To communicate with you about your account and our services
privacy.s3Item4: To keep the platform secure and prevent fraud
privacy.s3Item6: To analyze platform usage and improve the user experience
privacy.s4Intro: We only share your information in the following cases:
privacy.s4Item1Body: Your public profile and contact info are shared with users you match with.
privacy.s4Item2Body: We use third parties for hosting, analytics and customer support.
privacy.s4Item3Body: If required by law or to protect our rights.
privacy.s4Outro: We never sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.s5Body: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption, secure servers and regular security audits. However, no method of internet transmission or electronic storage can be guaranteed 100% secure.
privacy.s6Intro: Under GDPR you have the following rights:
privacy.s6Item1Body: You can request a copy of your personal data.
privacy.s6Item2Body: You can request correction of inaccurate information.
privacy.s6Item3Body: You can request deletion of your data.
privacy.s6Item4Body: You can request your data in a machine-readable format.
privacy.s6Item5Body: You can object to certain forms of data processing.
privacy.s6Outro: To exercise these rights, contact us at kontakt@hommies.dk.
privacy.s7Body: We use cookies to improve your experience on the platform. Cookies help us remember your preferences, analyze site usage and deliver personalized content. You can manage your cookie preferences in your browser settings.
privacy.s8Body: We retain your personal data for as long as needed to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, or as required by law. When your data is no longer needed, we securely delete or anonymize it.
privacy.s9Body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated by email or a prominent notice on the platform. We encourage you to review this policy regularly.
privacy.s10Body: If you have questions about this privacy policy or our handling of your data, you are welcome to contact us:

searchTogether.title: Focus.
searchTogether.subtitle: Gather your group, keep track of liked people and homes, and search together.
searchTogether.invitationAccepted: You are now a member of the group!

landing.heroSubtitle: Rooms, roomies and shared apartments across Denmark – all on one platform.
landing.featuredSubtitle: A selection from our active listings across the country.
landing.exploreSubtitle: Pick your city and see what's available right now.
landing.howSubtitle: Three steps from profile to move-in. Free to get started.
landing.howStep1Body: Tell us a bit about yourself, your interests and what you're looking for. It helps us find the right matches.
landing.howStep2Body: Swipe, like and find people and homes that fit you. We only show what's relevant.
landing.howStep3Body: Reach out directly in the app, arrange viewings and sort out the contract. Safe and easy.
landing.howStep3Chat: "Hi! The room is still available — can we view it on Saturday?"
landing.housingSubtitle: Verified profiles, direct communication and a focus on finding the right match — not just the first one.
landing.housingRoomsTitle: From cozy attic rooms to big shared apartments
landing.housingVerifiedBody: All users are approved before they can contact others.
landing.housingAllDkBody: Copenhagen, Aarhus, Odense, Aalborg and 50+ other cities.
landing.housingQuote: "Found my roomie in a week. We moved in together a month later — best decision."
landing.housingDirectBody: Message landlords and roomies directly — no waiting.
landing.ctaBody: Create a listing in minutes, receive requests from verified users and rent out with peace of mind.
landing.faqBody: Need an answer? Email us at
landing.faqA1: Create a free profile, browse available rooms or find roomies, and connect with potential matches. You can send requests and start conversations directly on the platform.
landing.faqA2: Yes. It's free to create a profile, browse listings, contact landlords and find roomies. We connect you with the right people with no hidden fees.
landing.faqQ3: How do I find a roomie?
landing.faqA3: Go to Matches and choose 'Roomies' to see profiles. Send a request, and if they accept, you can start a conversation.
landing.faqQ4: How do I contact a landlord?
landing.faqA4: When you find a room you like, you can send a request. If the landlord accepts, a chat opens where you can arrange viewings and details.
landing.faqQ5: How do I create a room listing?
landing.faqA5: Click 'Create listing' in the menu and follow the simple steps. Upload pictures, add details and a price. Your listing goes live immediately.
landing.faqA6: Yes, we review every user before they can contact others, so you can use the platform with peace of mind.
landing.partnerBody: As a Hommies user you get 10% off at Oscars Biludlejning — whether you're renting out or moving in. Easy, fast and at a good price.
